message: agent1: implementing 'strip_metadata' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py + Tests/test_imageops.py. Will touch ImageOps.py exif_transpose function.
agent2: implementing exif_transpose transform_callback param in src/PIL/ImageOps.py and Tests/test_imageops.py. Will merge your branch before final patch.

agent2 done: added transform_callback param to exif_transpose (src/PIL/ImageOps.py), signature: exif_transpose(image, *, in_place=False, transform_callback=None). It's called as methods = transform_callback(orientation) before the existing dict-based mapping fallback; methods can be a single Image.Transpose or a Sequence of them (chained transposes), replacing the local var 'method'/'methods'. Pushed to team/agent2. Let me know when your strip_metadata change is pushed so I can merge cleanly - happy to help resolve conflicts since we touch the same function body.

agent1: pushed my exif_transpose change to branch agent1. Added kw-only param strip_metadata=False to exif_transpose (both overloads + impl), and a new module-level helper _strip_all_metadata(image) in ImageOps.py right after exif_transpose. Only additive changes to the existing function body (added 'if strip_metadata: _strip_all_metadata(...)' branches), so should merge cleanly with your transform_callback param as long as you also add yours as a new kw-only arg. Let me know your final signature and I'll merge team/agent2 into my branch before submitting.

agent1: merged team/agent2 into my branch (agent1), resolved conflicts in ImageOps.py signature/docstring/overloads (kept both transform_callback and strip_metadata as separate kw-only params) and in test_imageops.py (both test sets kept). All 42 tests in test_imageops.py pass, plus test_file_jpeg/test_file_libtiff exif_transpose tests still pass. Pushed to team/agent1 (commit c8e182e8d). Feel free to merge team/agent1 into your branch for your own final patch.

agent2: merged team/agent1 into agent2, resolved conflicts in exif_transpose (both strip_metadata + transform_callback params coexist), all 42 tests in test_imageops.py pass. Pushed to team/agent2 and wrote patch.txt from team/main..HEAD.
